name: Squarespace
one_liner: Squarespace is a website building and commerce platform that provides APIs for managing commerce features such as orders, products, inventory, and customer data.

evidence.claim: Squarespace provides REST-based Commerce APIs to manage merchant site data including products, orders, inventory, and transactions.
Authentication for the API is handled via Bearer tokens (API keys or OAuth access tokens) in the Authorization header.
Developers can generate API keys within the Squarespace developer tools panel in their account settings.
Search citation: Squarespace Overview: Key Features, Benefits | RapidDev

auth_notes: API requests require an Authorization header with a Bearer token, which can be an API key or an OAuth access token.
access_notes: Developers can generate API keys directly within their Squarespace account settings under Developer Tools.
api_notes: The API is primarily focused on commerce functions (orders, products, inventory, transactions) and customer/contact management rather than full site-building control.
mcp_notes: No official or known community MCP server exists for Squarespace.
